title: Add workspace_status rollup to AgentRow
action: Per D4: add an agent_status: AgentStatus field to the wire::Workspace struct in src/herdr/wire.rs, parsed from session.snapshot's workspaces[].agent_status (same field name/vocabulary herdr already uses for per-agent status, and the same AgentStatus enum already defined in this file - do not invent a new enum). Add a workspace_status_for(&self, agent: &Agent) -> AgentStatus resolver method on Snapshot, following the same join-by-workspace_id lookup shape as the existing workspace_label_for (find by workspace_id, then map) - NOTE: AgentStatus has no Default impl (unlike String), so the join-miss fallback cannot be .unwrap_or_default() like workspace_label_for uses; use .unwrap_or(AgentStatus::Unknown) instead - behavioral parity with the label resolvers' join-miss safety, not identical code. Thread the resolved value onto AgentRow in src/web/api.rs as workspace_status: String (via .as_str().to_string(), same convention status already uses). Mirror the new field on the TS AgentRow interface in web/src/api.ts as workspace_status: AgentStatus (reuse the existing AgentStatus TS union type already exported from this file, do not redeclare it). Additive only - do not touch web/src/views/switcher.ts or web/src/styles.css in this cell.

truths: GET /api/agents response includes workspace_status for every row, resolved from workspaces[].agent_status in the live session.snapshot (not hardcoded)
workspace_status values use the exact same vocabulary as the existing per-agent status field: working, blocked, done, idle, unknown
A workspace_id with no matching entry in workspaces[] resolves workspace_status to unknown, not a panic or a missing field

artifacts.substantive: Workspace struct gains agent_status: AgentStatus; Snapshot gains a workspace_status_for resolver mirroring workspace_label_for's join pattern
AgentRow gains workspace_status: String populated from the wire.rs resolver
TS AgentRow gains workspace_status: AgentStatus, reusing the existing AgentStatus type

key_links: src/web/api.rs reads workspace_status from the wire.rs resolver, not recomputed independently
prohibitions: Do not remove or rename any existing field on Agent/Workspace/AgentRow
Do not touch web/src/views/switcher.ts or web/src/styles.css in this cell
Do not introduce a new status enum or vocabulary distinct from the existing AgentStatus

verify: cargo test --quiet && cargo clippy --quiet -- -D warnings && cd web && npm run typecheck

trace.outcome: Added workspace_status rollup to AgentRow, joined by workspace_id, wired end-to-end from wire.rs through api.rs to the TS AgentRow type.
